title: Spells & Shields: Magicians' Tinkering
description: New mana modifiers for tools, weapons and armor.
body:
# Spells & Shields: Magicians' Tinkering

An addon for [Spells & Shields](https://modrinth.com/mod/spells-shields "Spells & Shields") and [Tinkers' Construct](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-construct "Tinkers' Construct").

# Discord
Join my Discord server to get frequent updates about the mod. This is a direct channel to me for feedback & suggestions.

[![discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY](https://i.imgur.com/1FFOXRB.png)](https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY)  

[https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY](https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY "https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY")

## Features

- Spells & Shields enchantments added as modifiers (abilities) for Tinkers' Construct items.
- Customizable via data packs.

### Modifiers

- Maximum Mana = Armor + Book + Tube Coral: Increases your maximum mana while worn. More potent on chestplates and leggings than helmets and boots.
- Mana Regeneration = Armor + Book + Tube Coral Fan: Increases your mana regeneration while worn. More potent on chestplates and leggings than helmets and boots.
